chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sequence of the Rituals of Hajj

text:
]طواف النساء[
صم ارجع إلى البيت وطف به أسبوعا وهو طواف النساء، ثم صل ركعتين عند مقام إبراهيم عليه السلام أو حيث شئت من المسجد وقد حل لك النساء و [قد] فرغت من حجك كله إلا رمي الجمار وأحللت من كل شئ أحرمت منه ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
TAWAF AL-NISA
Return to the Kaaba and perform a circuit around it (Tawaf) of seven rounds, known as Tawaf al-Nisa'. Upon completing this Tawaf, pray two Rak’ahs near Maqam Ibrahim, or wherever you prefer in the mosque.
After performing Tawaf al-Nisa’, relations with women become permissible, and you will have completed all the rites of Hajj, except for the remaining Rami al-Jamarat (stoning of the pillars). You are now fully released from all restrictions of Ihram.
